ogTitle: Double Bay vs Doubtful Creek: Climate Safety

heading: Double Bay vs Doubtful Creek — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Double Bay, New South Wales and Doubtful Creek, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Double Bay and Doubtful Creek have similar overall climate risk scores.

faq.question: Is Double Bay or Doubtful Creek safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Double Bay has a flood risk score of 44/100, while Doubtful Creek scores 22/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Double Bay scores 19/100 for bushfire risk. Doubtful Creek scores 60/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Double Bay or Doubtful Creek?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Double Bay has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.37% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
